title: Microcoelia deflexicalcarata
taxonomy: Microcoelia deflexicalcarata belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This family is one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants in the world. Within the Orchidaceae family, Microcoelia deflexicalcarata is classified as a type of epiphytic orchid. Epiphytic orchids are non-woody plants that grow on other plants, such as trees, without deriving nutrients from them. Microcoelia deflexicalcarata is likely a member of the subtribe Microcoeleinae or the tribe Bulbophyllinae within the Orchidaceae family.
